def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  n = prices.length
  original_profit = 0
  n.times do |i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  prefix_strategy = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_prices = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
    prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i]
  end

  max_delta = 0
  (0... (n - k + 1)).each do |i|
    window_end = i + k - 1
    original_contribution = prefix_strategy[window_end + 1] - prefix_strategy[i]
    sum_second_half = prefix_prices[window_end + 1] - prefix_prices[i + k/2]
    delta = sum_second_half - original_contribution
    max_delta = delta if delta > max_delta
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end

    sum_second_half = prefix_prices[window_end + 1] - prefix_prices[i + k / 2]
    delta = sum_second_half - original_contribution
    max_delta = delta if delta > max_delta
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end

def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  n = prices.length
  original_profit = 0
  n.times do |i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  # Compute prefix_strategy and prefix_prices
  prefix_strategy = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_prices = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
    prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i]
  end

  max_delta = 0
  # Iterate over all possible windows
  (0... (n - k + 1)).each do |i|
    # window starts at i, ends at i + k -1
    window_end = i + k -1
    original_contribution = prefix_strategy[window_end + 1] - prefix_strategy[i]
    sum_second_half = prefix_prices[window_end + 1] - prefix_prices[i + k/2]
    delta = sum_second_half - original_contribution
    max_delta = delta if delta > max_delta
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end
